home.title: Apple retail stores, mapped and sourced.
home.subtitle: Browse notable stores, preserve closures and remodels, and help build a complete sourced dataset.
home.searchPlaceholder: Search by store, city, country, status, feature...
home.empty: No stores match this search yet.
home.remoteError: Live data is unavailable, showing the local reviewed seed.

map.title: Worldwide map
map.copy: {{count}} stores loaded, {{visited}} marked visited on this device.

profile.title: Visits and contributions without tracking.
profile.subtitle: Mark stores locally and keep a local username for GitHub issue submissions. No remote account is required.
profile.noVisits: No visits saved on this device yet.

privacy.noAds: No ads, no behavioral tracking SDKs, no resale of personal data.
privacy.localLocation: Location is used locally for nearby search unless a feature explicitly asks to save it.
privacy.optionalAccount: Visits and profile details stay on-device; contributions are sent as GitHub issues.
privacy.openData: Accepted factual contributions can enter the local dataset with source links and review history.

profile.localProfileCopy: Choose the username shown in GitHub issue submissions. It is saved only on this device.
profile.deleteWarningMessage: This action is irreversible. Your local profile and visits will be cleared from this device.
profile.deleted: All local data has been deleted.

theme.title: Theme & Logo
theme.copy: Select your preferred appearance. The home screen icon will sync automatically.

store.visitInvalidDate: Use a date formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.
store.shareText: I visited {{name}} in {{place}} on {{date}}. Tracked with Atlas.
store.photoPermissionDenied: Photo library permission is needed to choose an image.
store.caption: Caption

hours.official-link-only: Hours are not copied into Atlas because they change frequently.
hours.community-verified: Community-verified hours are available, with freshness metadata.
